strengths: Proven full-stack expertise across TypeScript, Node.js, React, and Nest.js equivalents, with direct experience building scalable enterprise tooling and AI-agent infrastructure at re:cinq.
Demonstrated ability to own end-to-end systems — from backend services in DLang/Java to frontend apps (Ember.js, iOS/TV) — aligning with the need for cross-stack ownership and adaptability.

Strong culture of engineering excellence evidenced by open-source contributions (GISCollective, Fluent-Asserts), testing frameworks (Vitest equivalents), CI/CD setup, and active knowledge sharing through workshops and talks.
concerns: Primary resume uses 'szabobogdan' as contact and GitHub handle, while name is Aisha Okonkwo — potential mismatch requiring clarification.
German language proficiency is listed as 'Basic', which may limit collaboration in a Berlin-based enterprise team with German-speaking stakeholders.
No explicit mention of Nest.js, Vitest, or PostgreSQL/MongoDB in resume — though equivalent technologies (Node.js, testing tools, MongoDB) are present, requiring inference.
response.justification: Aisha brings a rare blend of deep full-stack engineering experience, direct exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and internal tooling at re:cinq, and a proven track record of building scalable, test-driven systems across diverse tech stacks — all of which align tightly with the role’s need for an individual contributor who can design, own, and improve end-to-end solutions in a complex enterprise environment.
